name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Fixed a serious bug where a company's data could stop saving — new entries looked like they vanished after a refresh. Your data was never actually lost.
Needs a one-time database update from the owner (migration-012.sql) to repair affected accounts and prevent it happening again.
